description: Queen Patch 1 (29 January 2020) — Dungeon Changes and Improvements, Hideout and Gold Price Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Dungeon Changes and Improvements
items: Fame and loot for Elite Randomized Dungeons (the large-group Avalonian dungeons found in the Outlands) have been greatly boosted: Fame from enemies increased by approximately 45%; Loot from enemies increased by approximately 110%; Loot from chests increased by approximately 28% (Avalonian-specific loot increased by approximately 50%)
Fixed an issue where chests in Solo Randomized Dungeons were sometimes empty
In all dungeons, the chance of each individual in a party now receiving some loot from a chest has been increased, and the distribution of loot between party members will be more even
sections.searchable_text: Dungeon Changes Improvements Fame loot Elite Randomized Dungeons Avalonian Outlands enemies 45% 110% chests 28% 50% Solo Randomized Dungeons empty party distribution

sections.heading: Changes
items: Hideouts under construction can now only be seen on the local cluster map by those currently in the cluster
Gold price for Premium status has been adjusted
Updated Hideouts UI to more clearly explain when Hideout can be attacked
sections.searchable_text: Changes Hideouts construction cluster map Gold price Premium status Hideouts UI attacked

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed an issue where Windows 7, MacOS, and Android users had an increased frequency of blackscreens and disconnects
Treasures now spawn at cluster primetime on Saturdays and Sundays as intended
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Windows 7 MacOS Android blackscreens disconnects Treasures cluster primetime Saturdays Sundays
